item.title: When is the next results date for Mantra Capital Limited?
item.description: The next results date for Mantra Capital Limited is April 25, 2026. Time: Apr 20 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Shekhawati Industries Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Shekhawati Industries Ltd is April 27, 2026. Time: Apr 20 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Trent Ltd.?
item.description: The next results date for Trent Ltd. is April 22, 2026. Time: Apr 20 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: E2E Networks Q4 FY26: Strong Revenue Surge Masks Profitability Concerns
item.description: E2E Networks Ltd., India's leading hyperscaler focused on advanced Cloud GPU infrastructure, reported a dramatic turnaround in Q4 FY26 (Mar'26), posting a net profit of ₹6.44 crores after three consecutive quarters of losses. However, the company's return to profitability comes with significant caveats that warrant investor scrutiny. With a market capitalisation of ₹5,663 crores, the stock has declined 3.45% following the results announcement, reflecting market concerns about sustainability and valuation. Time: Apr 20 2026 09:46 PM IST

item.title: PNB Gilts Q4 FY26: Profit Plunge Raises Concerns Despite Stable Revenue
item.description: PNB Gilts Ltd., a leading primary dealer in government securities, reported a sharp decline in profitability for Q4 FY26, with net profit plummeting 82.69% quarter-on-quarter to ₹12.99 crores from ₹53.91 crores in Q3 FY26. The year-on-year performance showed an even steeper decline of 82.69% compared to ₹75.02 crores in Q4 FY25. The disappointing results triggered a negative market reaction, with the stock trading at ₹74.41 as of April 20, 2026, down 20.85% over the past year and significantly underperforming the broader market. Time: Apr 20 2026 09:45 PM IST

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: Strong Profit Growth and Sectoral Trends in Mar-2026 Results
item.description: The March 2026 quarterly earnings season has revealed a marked improvement in corporate profitability, with 58.0% of the 69 companies reporting positive results, a significant rise from 46.0% in December 2025. Mid and small cap stocks have led this upswing, signalling renewed investor confidence and sectoral resilience amid a mixed macroeconomic backdrop. Time: Apr 20 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: Bajaj Consumer Joins Reliable Performers List Following Strong Q4 Results
item.description: Bajaj Consumer, a small-cap FMCG company, has been added to the prestigious Reliable Performers list as of 20 April 2026, following an impressive quarter ending March 2026 that showcased robust financial growth and operational excellence. This inclusion reflects the company’s consistent fundamental strength and promising outlook, making it a compelling addition for investors seeking dependable growth in the small-cap segment. Time: Apr 20 2026 08:30 PM IST

item.title: Macpower CNC Joins MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Financial Upswing
item.description: Macpower CNC, a micro-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, has been added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 20 April 2026, reflecting its robust financial performance and compelling momentum characteristics. The company’s recent quarterly results demonstrate significant growth across key metrics, positioning it as a promising candidate for investors seeking dynamic opportunities within small-cap industrials. Time: Apr 20 2026 08:30 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Ingersoll-Rand (India) Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Ingersoll-Rand (India) Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 20 Apr 2026. While this technical event often suggests a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a nuanced picture that merits closer examination. Time: Apr 20 2026 06:00 PM IST
